title: microsorum ensiforme
intro: Microsorum ensiforme is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Polypodiaceae family and commonly known as the 'Water Fern'. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Microsorum ensiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in capsules or powder form.
